title: segfault again! (during last week I found 3 segfault bugs already)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE financialdata.stocks (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, trade_time TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, trade_date TIMESTAMPTZ, ticker VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, currency VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, opening_price DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, highest_price DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, lowest_price DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, closing_price DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, trade_volume DOUBLE PRECISION);

INSERT INTO financialdata.stocks (trade_time, trade_date, ticker, currency, opening_price, highest_price, lowest_price, closing_price, trade_volume) VALUES (NOW(), NOW(), 'AAPL', 'USD', 150.0, 155.0, 149.0, 154.0, 10000.0);

SELECT * FROM (WITH daily_open AS (SELECT trade_date, opening_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY trade_date ORDER BY trade_time ASC) AS rnk FROM financialdata.stocks WHERE ticker='AAPL' AND trade_date IS NOT NULL AND trade_date > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'), daily_close AS (SELECT trade_date, closing_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY trade_date ORDER BY trade_time DESC) AS rnk FROM financialdata.stocks WHERE ticker='AAPL' AND trade_date IS NOT NULL AND trade_date > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'), daily_stats AS (SELECT trade_date, MAX(highest_price) AS highest_price, MIN(lowest_price) AS lowest_price, SUM(trade_volume) AS trade_volume FROM financialdata.stocks WHERE ticker='AAPL' AND trade_date IS NOT NULL AND trade_date > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY trade_date) SELECT daily_open.trade_date, daily_open.opening_price, daily_stats.highest_price, daily_stats.lowest_price, daily_close.closing_price, daily_stats.trade_volume FROM daily_open JOIN daily_close ON daily_open.trade_date = daily_close.trade_date JOIN daily_stats ON daily_open.trade_date = daily_stats.trade_date WHERE daily_open.rnk=1 AND daily_close.rnk=1 ORDER BY trade_date DESC) AS result;
key_bug_features: SELECT statement with complex CTEs and date casting
